desc: ClashManagerCaptureAllImagesInBackgroundCommand — bulk-capture every clash matching the filter.
summary: ClashManagerCaptureAllImagesInBackgroundCommand — bulk-capture every clash matching the filter.
usecase: QA dashboard image refresh before an export.
precondition: Active document; staging DB has ≥ 1 matching clash; non-template View3D exists.
postcondition: 0-N PNGs on disk; no Revit view switch for the user.
logictree:
1) Pull clashes from repo.ListByState(state_filter ?? "*").
2) For each, resolve pair; skip with WireRecoverable on missing.
3) Delegate to HiddenViewImageCaptureService.Capture (own Transaction per call).
4) Aggregate captured vs failed counts.
5) Emit per_clash list + summary.
